---
ID: US-CMP-FE-1203
Title: Content detail side panel without navigation loss
Status: Not Started
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
Ticket: CMP-FE-1203
Epic: CMP-PAR-E1: Workspace IA and Context Integrity
---

As a content editor or reviewer
I want content details to open in a side panel from list and queue views
So I can review and edit items without losing my place in the workspace

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Clicking a content row opens a right-side panel while keeping the underlying list visible.
- [ ] Panel header shows title, status, owner, and primary next action.
- [ ] Panel includes compact metadata, editable draft body (when allowed), review thread, and activity history.
- [ ] Panel supports close, escape key, and click-outside behaviors without route reset.
- [ ] Missing metadata and overdue dates are visually flagged in the panel.
- [ ] Panel section layout remains readable at desktop and tablet breakpoints.
